title: Erect timber structures and features
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Erect timber structures and features demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Interpret site plan and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plan and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plan and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Check quantity and quality of materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check quantity and quality of materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check quantity and quality of materials.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment required for construction work and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment required for construction work and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required for construction work and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare work

elements.title: Set out the site and prepare the profile and footings

pcs.text: Determine, locate and mark out services from site plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, locate and mark out services from site plan.

pcs.text: Mark out position of structure or feature according to design drawings and specifications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out position of structure or feature according to design drawings and specifications.

pcs.text: Establish profiles to conform to nominated tolerances

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish profiles to conform to nominated tolerances.

pcs.text: Excavate and prepare footings according to type of structure to be erected

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate and prepare footings according to type of structure to be erected.
